授業目的: The course aims at strengthening your confidence in using English for communication. By the end of this term, you should have improved your skills in written and oral communication in English.
到達目標: 1) The student can compose and communicate a clearly formulated and persuasive message orally and in writing. 2) The student masters the paragraph format and can present, analyze, and discuss information in an academically acceptable format. 3) In oral presentations, the participant can convey her/his messages to others.
授業方法: 注　学院の方針に従って授業は教室で行うが、認められるニーズあれば、平行同時双方向型オンライン授業で実施予定だ。

Chapter 1.
【Flex Hours】《10minutes》+ Start your diary. Bring it for inspection next week.
第4回:
【Core Week③】"Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
What makes a talk persuasive? 
Textbook based

Prepare a 5-minute argumentative talk. The topic is "Why I think that ..."
Complete practices assigned.
第6回:
【Core Week⑤】"Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
Argumentative talks 
In this and the following classes, seven people will each give a five-minute talk, followed by time for the audience to write a short review. Talks should be prepared with PowerPoint or a similar program that has a tele-prompt function and that can make a video recording of the presentation. The video must be submitted as a partial fulfillment of the task. Speakers must submit a written reflection on their performances based on the video and comments from peers and the teacher.
第10回:
【Core Week➈】"Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
(Argumentative talks if any are left). Textbook based
第13回:
【Core Week⑫】"Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
End of term test. In class with pencil and paper, and without access to the Internet.
第14回: 【Flex Hours】《180minutes》Keep a diary in English in the notebook you will receive in the first face-to-face class. Write 37 - 63 entries @ 80 - 100 words. All entries must be dated and handwritten. The diary will be checked regularly in class. You are not allowed to recycle entries you wrote or copy-paste entries by others. The aim is to enhance confidence and fluency in English composition, so although it is tempting to use GenAI for writing or grammar check, don't do that. Relevant illustrations can be included and count up to 20 percent of an entry. Quotations must be marked as such and will not count more than 20 percent of an entry, no matter how long they are.
トピック.授業外学習2: Expect about 2 hours of homework per week.  Copying is illegal, quoting is alright. If for some reason I find you are copying text, the first time you will be warned, the next you will fail. The internet is full of useful and useless information, including ready-made essays. It is fine to learn from such information, but unless you are the original author, you cannot get the credit for it.

教科書/Required texts1: 4 Q:Skills for Success Reading and Writing Fourth Edition Student Book with online Practice Pack
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。

成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: Content quality counts 60 percent, language accuracy and other formal qualities 40 percent.
成績評価Grading2: 授業外学修課題／Assignment, homework required outside class (06)
Diary = 20 points. 3 reports, 2 @ 10 points.  Content quality counts 60 percent, language accuracy and other formal qualities 40 percent.
成績評価Grading3: プレゼンテーション・発表／Presentation (07)
One oral presentation and feedback-reflections. 20 point
成績評価Grading4: 授業への参加度（自発性、積極性、主体性、等）／In-class participation,contribution (09)
Peer-reviews, active participation including preparedness to answer questions.
成績評価Grading5: 備考　Note Individual reports: Throughout the course, you will get assignments - written and oral reports. All of them count toward the final grade. Content quality accounts for 60 percent, while language accuracy and other formal qualities comprise 40 percent. NB: COPY-PASTE IS ILLEGAL. Using AI-assistance is tempting but simply handing in the output will earn you 0 points. Treat all parts you have not modified as quotations: Write the name and version of any GenAI you used and the prompts you fed them. Other: Attendance is mandatory in accordance with the rules of the School of Law and Politics. More than four absences means you will fail the class. And it is not enough for you to be present, you must participate actively. When you are on your electronic devise without permission I will consider you inactive or absent.
備考Note0:
Bring your own devise for every class.
Attendance is mandatory in accordance with the rules of the School of Law and Politics. Be on time for class, and be prepared.  Arrival in class after 15 minutes after class has started = absent. If you are absent more than 4 times without a proper and accepted reason, you have disqualified yourself in this class. Copy-paste is illegal, and if I find you do it, you fail the class.

成績評価備考:
備考　Note
Individual reports: Throughout the course, you will get assignments - written and oral reports. All of them count toward the final grade. Content quality accounts for 60 percent, while language accuracy and other formal qualities comprise 40 percent.
NB: COPY-PASTE IS ILLEGAL. 

Using AI-assistance is tempting but simply handing in the output will earn you 0 points. Treat all parts you have not modified as quotations: Write the name and version of any GenAI you used and the prompts you fed them. 

Other: Attendance is mandatory in accordance with the rules of the School of Law and Politics. More than four absences means you will fail the class. And it is not enough for you to be present, you must participate actively. When you are on your electronic devise without permission I will consider you inactive or absent.
